job_description:
Passionate about precision medicine and advancing the healthcare industry?

Recent advancements in underlying technology have finally made it possible for AI to impact clinical care in a meaningful way. Tempus' proprietary platform connects an entire ecosystem of real-world evidence to deliver real-time, actionable insights to physicians, providing critical information about the right treatments for the right patients, at the right time.

Job Description
Responsibilities: 

Analyze large data sets and market intelligence to develop insights on business performance and new tangible strategies

Drive sales force effectiveness through sales enablement programs and resources

Support creation of content for Provider business leadership team including quarterly leadership meetings, customer-facing presentations, and internal strategic initiatives

Project manage operations of core Provider business functions

Cross-functional coordination of teams across marketing, medical, sales operations, customer success, product, and learning and development teams. 

Collaborate with leadership on communication strategies

Work collaboratively with Commercial Strategy & Operations Manager on go-to-market strategies for new products and partnerships

The successful candidate for this role will be:    

A strong and open personality: Independent, strategic, humble, and comfortable creating structure out of ambiguity (self-starter). You are comfortable asking questions, putting forward creative solutions towards problems, and living on a steep learning curve.

A leader: Self-aware, leads through action, and wins followers with a positive and energetic approach to work and life. Gets energy from solving difficult problems.    

Able to develop strong relationships: navigation of the organization and building rapport with key stakeholders across the organization is essential to delivering on the strategy

Adaptable: You are able to pivot and handle multiple initiatives at once. You can handle feedback and adjust your approach as it fits the needs of the initiatives. 

Competitive in nature: Action-oriented, results-driven, a team player, and passionate for their focus and pursuits. 

$65,000 - 95,000 - In office at Tempus HQ in Chicago - 3 days per week

The expected salary range above is applicable if the role is performed from Illinois and may vary for other locations (California, Colorado, New York). Actual salary may vary based on qualifications and experience. Tempus offers a full range of benefits, which may include incentive compensation, restricted stock units, medical and other benefits depending on the position.

We are an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.

policy_result.mobility_strategy: Leverage your status as a current F-1 student in the US to secure CPT/OPT opportunities, which provide the most viable path to long-term sponsorship. Prioritize companies with established H-1B and O-1 petition pipelines to mitigate the risk of post-graduation employment gaps.
priority_policy_themes: TN visa eligibility for Canadian cross-border roles
constraints: High dependency on employer-led immigration petitions
opportunity_signals: Strong alignment with STEM-designated Master's programs
High demand for data-driven healthcare and infrastructure analytics
Growth in mission-driven nonprofit and research-based AI sectors
policy_result.explanation: Your profile is highly competitive for the US market due to your advanced degree and specialized research experience, but you face significant hurdles regarding visa sponsorship. To maximize success, focus on large-scale organizations or research institutes that regularly sponsor international talent. By targeting roles in healthcare or infrastructure, you align with sectors that often provide more stable, long-term visa support compared to early-stage startups.

ranked_industries.name: Healthcare & Biomedical Informatics
ranked_industries.why_now: Your research experience at the Lung Cancer Research Institute and Computer Vision Lab provides immediate, highly relevant domain expertise.
ranked_industries.company_strategy_hint: Target large academic medical centers, research hospitals, and established biotech firms with dedicated data science departments.
ranked_industries.market_stage: High stability sector with consistent demand for data-driven clinical and operational improvements.
ranked_industries.trend_summary: Increasing investment in AI-driven diagnostics and personalized medicine creates a steady pipeline for specialized data analysts.
ranked_industries.long_term_growth: Offers high job security and significant potential for specialization in high-impact medical AI research.
ranked_industries.personalized_reason: Your background in biomedical data pipelines makes you a top-tier candidate for roles that require both analytical rigor and domain-specific research experience.

ranked_industries.name: Infrastructure & Public Sector Analytics
ranked_industries.why_now: Your work at USHER Technologies on earthquake damage assessment aligns perfectly with the growing focus on resilient infrastructure and smart city initiatives.
ranked_industries.company_strategy_hint: Look for government contractors, civil engineering firms, and urban planning tech companies.

ranked_industries.personalized_reason: Your proven ability to apply ML to physical infrastructure problems provides a unique value proposition that few generalist data analysts possess.

application_assets_result.cover_letter_draft: As a Data Science graduate with a background in biomedical research, I am drawn to Tempus AI's mission to personalize patient care through data. My experience developing reproducible analysis pipelines at the Lung Cancer Research Institute and building SQL-based KPI reporting has prepared me to drive commercial strategy and sales force effectiveness. I am eager to apply my technical rigor to help your Provider business team scale its precision medicine initiatives.
application_assets_result.cold_email_message: Hi [Name], I've been following Tempus AI's work in precision medicine and am impressed by your team's approach to clinical cohort identification. With my background in biomedical data science and experience building SQL dashboards for research operations, I am very interested in the Commercial Strategy & Operations Analyst role. Would you be open to a brief chat about how your team balances technical data output with commercial business goals?
